prompt: Add Firebase Cloud Messaging for push notifications

<task>
Add Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) for sending push notifications to mobile devices.
</task>

arguments.query: firebase-admin Python FCM send push notification example

turns.content:
1. Firebase Admin Python SDK - https://firebase.google.com/docs/cloud-messaging/send-message#python
   pip install firebase-admin. Initialize with credentials. messaging.send(Message(...)).

arguments.title: Firebase Cloud Messaging Python SDK
arguments.content:
pip install firebase-admin
import firebase_admin
from firebase_admin import credentials, messaging
cred = credentials.Certificate('service-account.json')
firebase_admin.initialize_app(cred)
msg = messaging.Message(notification=messaging.Notification(title, body), token=device_token)
response = messaging.send(msg) → message ID string
Multicast: messaging.MulticastMessage(tokens=[...]) with messaging.send_each_for_multicast(msg)

turns.content: Finding recorded: Firebase Cloud Messaging Python SDK

arguments.content:
import os
import logging
import firebase_admin
from firebase_admin import credentials, messaging

log = logging.getLogger(__name__)

_app = None

def _init_firebase():
    global _app
    if _app is not None:
        return
    cred_path = os.environ.get('FIREBASE_CREDENTIALS', 'firebase-credentials.json')
    cred = credentials.Certificate(cred_path)
    _app = firebase_admin.initialize_app(cred)


def send_push(device_token: str, title: str, body: str, data: dict = None) -> str:
    _init_firebase()
    msg = messaging.Message(
        notification=messaging.Notification(title=title, body=body),
        data=data or {},
        token=device_token,
    )
    response = messaging.send(msg)
    log.info('Push sent: %s', response)
    return response


def send_push_batch(tokens: list[str], title: str, body: str, data: dict = None) -> int:
    _init_firebase()
    msg = messaging.MulticastMessage(
        notification=messaging.Notification(title=title, body=body),
        data=data or {},
        tokens=tokens,
    )
    response = messaging.send_each_for_multicast(msg)
    log.info('Batch push: %d success, %d failure', response.success_count, response.failure_count)
    return response.success_count

arguments.message: FCM push notifications ready. send_push() for single device, send_push_batch() for multiple devices. Set FIREBASE_CREDENTIALS env var to point to your service account JSON file. Firebase is initialized lazily on first call.

arguments.summary: Created FCM push notification service with single and batch sending. Lazy Firebase initialization. Uses firebase-admin SDK.
arguments.final_answer: Firebase Cloud Messaging integrated. send_push() for single device, send_push_batch() for multicast. Set FIREBASE_CREDENTIALS env var. Lazy initialization.
